title: Login with Facebook - Positive Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Login with Facebook' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the Facebook login page. | After successful login, the user should be redirected back to the Ticketpop app.

title: Connect with Email - Positive Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Connect with Email' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the email login page. | After successful login, the user should be redirected back to the Ticketpop app.

title: Sign In Button - Positive Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Sign In' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the login page.

title: Skip Button - Positive Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Skip' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the main screen of the Ticketpop app.

title: Login with Facebook - Negative Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Login with Facebook' button. | Cancel the Facebook login process.
expected_result: The user should be redirected back to the login page.

title: Connect with Email - Negative Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Connect with Email' button. | Cancel the email login process.
expected_result: The user should be redirected back to the login page.

title: Sign In Button - Negative Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Sign In' button. | Cancel the login process.
expected_result: The user should be redirected back to the login page.

title: Skip Button - Negative Flow
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Skip' button. | Cancel the login process.
expected_result: The user should be redirected back to the login page.

title: Login with Facebook - Boundary/Validation
test_steps: Open the Ticketpop app. | Click on the 'Login with Facebook' button. | Ensure the Facebook login process is successful.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the main screen of the Ticketpop app.
